caption: A person with a white watch and a gold ring works on a crafting project on a white surface. They use floral and patterned papers, including a tan brick-patterned card. In the initial scene, the person's left hand rests on the card, while the right hand is out of view. As the sequence progresses, the person lifts and shifts the card to reveal more of the materials underneath. Various crafting tools are scattered around, including a blue tape dispenser and red ink pads. The text "BLOOM WHERE YOU'RE PLANTED" and "12" X 12" DESIGNER SERIES PAPER" is overlaid across the center of the scene. A smaller note in the upper left corner reads, "Wishing you a BIRTHDAY filled with ALL the best things." A logo for "Stamping Jill" is visible in the bottom left corner. The scene transitions from a static placement of the card to the person actively moving it.
